description.overview: A rare breed, the Field Spaniel is a sensitive, sweet-natured dog who bonds closely with their family. They're calmer than Cockers but still playful.
description.history: The Field Spaniel originated in England.
description.temperament: Known for being sensitive, docile, affectionate.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their single coat, silky, moderately long coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A rare breed, the Field Spaniel is a sensitive, sweet-natured dog who bonds closely with their family. They're calmer than Cockers but still playful.
